title: daviesia mimosoides subsp. acris
intro: Daviesia mimosoides subsp. acris, also known as bitter pea, is a plant species native to Australia, belonging to the Fabaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include being a stimulant and expectorant, helping to relieve coughs and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Daviesia mimosoides subsp. acris include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and act as an antimicrobial agent. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using this plant for medicinal purposes due to its potential toxicity.
